titleStmt.title: SII 26.10: original edition by P. R. Srinivasan
No. 10. (A.R. No. 10 of 1909.) POṈ-AMARĀVATI, TIRUMAYAM TALUK, TIRUCHIRAPPALLI DISTRICT.

summary.p: On the north wall of the central shrine in the Chōḷēśvara temple.

This record registers a gift, by Tirukkoḍuṅkuṉṟamuḍaiyāṉ Kēraḷaṉ alias Nishadharājaṉ, probably identical with the donor of No. 5 above, of the village Veḻkūr alias Malayadhvaja-chchaturvēdimaṅgalam in Puṟamalaināḍu, as tirunāmattukkāṇi and also of the taxes such as kaḍamai, antarāyam, veṭṭimuṭṭam, ecchōṟu, kūṟṟariśi elavai, araiśāvu, śilvari, peruvari and others from the lands in the village to the Tirukkāmakōṭṭa-nāchchiyār alias Āluḍaiya-nāchchiyār of the Rājēndraśōḷīśvara-muḍaiya-nayanār temple at Poṉṉamarāvati in Puṟamalai-nāḍu for various offerings including tiruppaḍimāṟṟu to the goddess.
Cf. Inscriptions (Texts) of the Pudukkottai State, No. 245.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . koccaṭaiyapaṉmarāṉa tiripuvaṉaccakkaravattikaḷ śrīkulacekaratevaṟku yāṇṭu pattiṉ
muṉṟāvatiṉ Etirppattāvatu puṟamalaināṭṭup poṉṉamarāpati tirukkoṭuṅkuṉṟamuṭaiyaca
ṉ keraḷaṉāṉa niṣadharaājaṉeṉ Ivvūr Uṭaiyār Irācentiracoḷiśvara muṭaiyār koyiṟ tirukkā
makkoṭṭamuṭaiya Āḷuṭaiya nācciyārkkut tiruppaṭimāṟṟuḷḷiṭṭu veṇṭum nittanivantaṅkaḷḷuk
ku Innāṭṭu veḻkūrāṉa malaiyadhvajaccaturvetimaṅkalam nāṉkellaikkuṭpaṭṭa nilattiṟ kaṭamaiya
ntarāyam veṭṭimuṭṭam Eccoṟu kūṟṟarici Elavai Araicāvu cilvari peruvari Ivūrāril maṟṟum Eppe
ṟpaṭṭaṉavuṅkuṭutteṉ Uṭaiyār raājentiracoḷiśvaramuṭaiya nāyaṉār koyiṟ tirukkāmakkoṭṭamu
ṭaiya Āḷuṭaiyanācciyaārkkut tiruppaṭimāṟṟuḷḷiṭṭu veṇṭum nitta nivantaṅkaḷukku tirukkoṭuṅkuṉṟamuṭaiyāṉ
keraḷaṉāṉa niṣadharaājaṉeṉ Innācciyaārkku Innāṭṭu ciṟuvayal puñcai nañcai Akappaṭa perunāṅkellaiyum
tirunāmattāl tirunāmattukkāṇi Āka tirukkaimalarile nirvārttu kuṭutteṉ keraḷa nicatarāyaneṉ paṉmā
yecura Irakṣai ..
Digital edition of SII 26.10 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
